title: [Epic] Increase pkg/server Admin API Test Coverage
body: Increase the test coverage for critical admin-facing API endpoints in `pkg/server` (currently ~60%). Focus areas include Audit Logging, Token Management, User Management, and Setup/Overrides.

issues.title: Add test coverage for `handleAdminAuditLog` & `handleAdminAuditExport`
issues.body: Write unit tests in `pkg/server` to cover `handleAdminAuditLog` and `handleAdminAuditExport`. Ensure pagination, search, and CSV/PDF export modes are properly mocked and validated.

issues.title: Add test coverage for `handleDeleteToken` & `handleAdminDeleteToken`
issues.body: Write unit tests for `handleDeleteToken` and `handleAdminDeleteToken`. Verify correct token revocation behavior and proper response codes for valid and invalid inputs.

issues.title: Add test coverage for `handleAdminListUsers`
issues.body: Write unit tests for `handleAdminListUsers`. Verify correct returned payload, handling of search parameters, and JSON response structure.

issues.title: Add test coverage for Setup endpoints (`handleSetupPage` & `handleCompleteSetup`)
issues.body: Write unit tests for `handleSetupPage` and `handleCompleteSetup` to ensure they handle the initial installation flow securely and prevent re-setup.
